features.name: interface with clocking block and modport referencing clocking
features.description: Code should include an interface definition containing a clocking block, where a modport references that clocking block along with other signals

features.name: modport with clocking block reference
features.description: Code should include a modport declaration that references a clocking block by name as one of its ports

features.name: clocking block with default input output skew
features.description: Code should include a clocking block definition with default input and output skew specifications
